summary: Frontend-only iteration: Mobile hamburger menu in Header.jsx tested across 4 auth states (anonymous, validated user Lotte, admin, pending user) at two viewports (390x844 mobile, 1920x800 desktop). All 30+ assertions pass. Header correctly hides desktop nav <768px, shows hamburger; dropdown contains only role-appropriate links; outside-click and route-change both close dropdown; aria-expanded/aria-label toggle correctly; logout via mobile button clears il_token cookie and redirects.
critical_code_review_comments: Header.jsx (253 lines) is clean and well-structured. Desktop section uses 'hidden md:flex'; mobile section uses 'md:hidden' — no visibility overlap.
Outside-click handler is correctly scoped: listener only registered while mobileOpen=true and removed on cleanup. Uses both mobileMenuRef and hamburgerRef to avoid the toggle-button re-closing race.
Route change closes dropdown via useEffect on location.pathname — correctly handles edge case where user is already on target route (NavLink click still triggers re-render).

mobileNavItems config-driven approach with role-based 'show' flag is DRY. isValidated (user.status === 'validated') gates the four member-only links; isAdmin adds admin link; isLoggedIn adds Mijn profiel.
Pending user correctly sees only Catalogus + Mijn profiel + Uitloggen (verified live with freshly registered pending user — status='pending' returned from /api/auth/register/new-org).
aria-label toggles 'Menu openen' ↔ 'Menu sluiten' and aria-expanded reflects state — verified live. Hamburger button is keyboard focusable (native <button>).

All required data-testids present: hamburger-button, mobile-menu-dropdown, mobile-nav-{catalogus,new-listing,aanvragen,mijn-aanbiedingen,my-org,admin,profiel}, mobile-header-{login-link,register-link,logout-btn}.

Minor nit: register/new-org POST schema in this codebase uses FLAT keys (email, password, firstName, lastName, orgName, orgDescription, orgCategory, acceptedTerms) — not nested {user:{}, organisation:{}} as one might infer from review-request hint. Documenting for next agent.
test_credentials: admin@inlimbo.be / Admin123!, lotte@atelier-brussel.example / User123!. Created fresh pending user testpending_1779837381@example.com / Pending123! (org TEST_org_1779837381) — both user and org are status=pending. This pending user remains in DB for any retest needs.
seed_data_creation: Registered one new pending user+org pair via POST /api/auth/register/new-org (flat-keys schema): email=testpending_1779837381@example.com, orgName=TEST_org_1779837381, category=Ander. Both pending. No other data created. Seed users untouched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile hamburger Header.jsx iteration is complete and green. To register a fresh pending user, POST /api/auth/register/new-org with FLAT keys: {email, password, firstName, lastName, orgName, orgDescription, orgCategory, acceptedTerms}. Returned status='pending'. After login, pending user is redirected to /wachtkamer but can still navigate to / via direct URL; mobile menu correctly limits links to Catalogus + Mijn profiel + Uitloggen.

playwright_test_summary.mobile_anon: hamburger visible, desktop nav hidden, dropdown opens with Catalogus+Inloggen+Word lid (no Uitloggen), outside-click closes, Catalogus link navigates+closes, aria-expanded=true & aria-label='Menu sluiten' when open
playwright_test_summary.mobile_lotte: dropdown shows 'Ingelogd als Lotte Vandenberghe' + Catalogus + Nieuwe aanbieding + Mijn aanvragen + Mijn aanbiedingen + Mijn organisatie + Mijn profiel + Uitloggen; no Admin; Mijn aanbiedingen link navigates+closes; Uitloggen clears il_token cookie + dropdown closes
playwright_test_summary.mobile_admin: dropdown additionally shows Admin link alongside the user links
playwright_test_summary.mobile_pending: dropdown shows only Catalogus + Mijn profiel + Uitloggen — confirmed no Nieuwe aanbieding, no Mijn aanvragen, no Mijn aanbiedingen, no Mijn organisatie, no Admin
playwright_test_summary.desktop_anon_1920: hamburger NOT visible; nav-catalogus + header-login-link + header-register-link all visible
playwright_test_summary.desktop_lotte_1920: hamburger NOT visible; header-profile-link + header-logout-btn visible
